scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build && npm audit --omit=dev --prefix client && npm audit --omit=dev --prefix server
scripts.render:build: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.render:start: npm run prisma:deploy --prefix server && npm run prisma:seed --prefix server && npm start --prefix server
